title: Modonome message overrides
description: Spec of record: prompts/modonome.core.md Configuration. Operator overrides for the built-in message catalog (scripts/lib/messages.mjs). Only entries with an id already present in the built-in catalog are meaningful; unknown ids are a validation error. An entry whose catalog id is non_suppressible may still override its wording, but its severity may never resolve below the catalog floor and suppressed may never be true for it (enforced by scripts/lib/messages.mjs and scripts/check-message-catalog-integrity.mjs, not by this schema alone, since the floor value lives in code).

overrides.description: message_id -> operator override. All fields optional; omit a field to keep the catalog default.
